agent.greeting: Hey. I'm your Man vs Health agent. I'm here to help you navigate your health journey — nutrition, allergies, wellness, whatever you're dealing with. What's on your mind?
cannedResponses: That's a great question. Nutrition is the foundational pillar of health — most issues people struggle with have a nutritional component. Tell me more about what you're dealing with.
I hear you. A lot of people deal with that. Have you considered looking at this from a dietary angle first? Sometimes the simplest interventions make the biggest difference.
Interesting. Let me think about that... The approach I'd recommend starts with understanding your current baseline. What does a typical day of eating look like for you?
That's something I can help with. At Man vs Health, we believe in at-home, low-intervention solutions first. Let's figure out what's realistic for your lifestyle.
Good point. I want to make sure I understand your situation fully before making any recommendations. Can you tell me a bit more about your goals?
I appreciate you sharing that. Health journeys are personal, and what works for one person doesn't always work for another. Let's find what works for YOU.
That's actually more common than you'd think. The key is consistency over perfection. Small, sustainable changes beat dramatic overhauls every time.
I have some thoughts on that. But first — have you had this conversation with your doctor? I can help you prepare the right questions to ask them.

welcome.title: Welcome to Man vs Health
welcome.description: Your personal health agent. Ask me about nutrition, allergies, wellness plans, or just tell me what's on your mind.

emptyState.title: Your health artifacts will appear here
emptyState.description: As you talk with the agent, your personalized health plans, nutrition guides, progress reports, and other artifacts will materialize in this space.
